productContent.fullTitle: Air Jordan 11 Retro Low "University Blue" Men's Shoes
productContent.title: Air Jordan 11 Retro Low "University Blue"
productContent.subtitle: Men's Shoes
productContent.description:
25 years since its initial release, the AJ11 still makes heads swivel. That icy outsole. Those patent leather mudguards. That crispy University Blue. A classic's a classic for a reason.


Benefits

  • Full-length Air-Sole unit delivers lightweight cushioning.
  • Contoured mudguard wraps the entire shoe, providing durability with sleek distinction.
  • Rubber outsole provides durable traction.

content.text: Comfortable, durable and timeless—it’s number one for a reason. The classic ‘80s construction  of the Air Force 1 is retooled to suit your skateboarding needs. A plush collar adds extra padding around the ankle, and a premium suede upper in Light Orewood Brown creates more flexibility to the fit. Hits of Pink Foam add subtle pops of color, and a Gum Light Brown outsole keeps the heritage look.

properties.body:
Comfortable, durable and timeless—it’s number one for a reason. The classic ‘80s construction of the Air Force 1 is retooled to suit your skateboarding needs. A plush collar adds extra padding around the ankle, and a premium suede upper in Light Orewood Brown creates more flexibility to the fit. Hits of Pink Foam add subtle pops of color, and a Gum Light Brown outsole keeps the heritage look.
SKU: HM8517-100
properties.title: Light Orewood Brown and Pink Foam
properties.subtitle: Nike SB Air Force 1 Low

content.text: Remember the revolution. 1987 saw the birth of the Air Max lineage, showcasing visible Air for the first time. What began as an experiment in cushioning soon evolved into an icon on the track and the streets. Over the years, it's been reimagined and retooled, but the heritage always remains.

properties.body: Remember the revolution. 1987 saw the birth of the Air Max lineage, showcasing visible Air for the first time. What began as an experiment in cushioning soon evolved into an icon on the track and the streets. Over the years, it's been reimagined and retooled, but the heritage always remains.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike SB Air Force 1 Skate Shoes
productContent.title: Nike SB Air Force 1
productContent.subtitle: Skate Shoes
productContent.description:
Comfortable, durable and timeless—it’s number one for a reason. The classic ‘80s construction pairs with bold details for style that tracks whether you’re on court or on the go.


Benefits

  • Leather upper with a perforated toe box is breathable and comfortable.
  • Originally designed for performance hoops, Nike Air cushioning adds lightweight, all-day comfort.
  • Rubber outsole with heritage hoops pivot circles delivers traction and durability.

Product Details

  • Padded collar

content.text: Before ACG was ACG, the LDV summited peaks. Initially a long-distance running shoe, the LDV underwent some durability upgrades to get it trail ready. What you get today still rocks the breathable mesh and the grippy Waffle outsoles but lives where it should, with ACG. Long live the Long Distance Vector.

properties.body:
Before ACG was ACG, the LDV summited peaks. Initially a long-distance running shoe, the LDV underwent some durability upgrades to get it trail ready. What you get today still rocks the breathable mesh and the grippy Waffle outsoles but lives where it should, with ACG. Long live the Long Distance Vector.
SKU: IF2857-400

productContent.fullTitle: ACG LDV Men's Shoes
productContent.title: ACG LDV
productContent.subtitle: Men's Shoes
productContent.description:
Before ACG was ACG, the LDV summited peaks. Initially a long-distance running shoe, the LDV underwent some durability upgrades to get it trail ready. What you get today still rocks the breathable mesh and the grippy Waffle outsoles but lives where it should, with ACG. Long live the Long Distance Vector.


Benefits

  • Mesh upper is durable and breathable.
  • Rubber Waffle outsole gives you durable traction and heritage style.

content.text: There's only one way to celebrate 40 years of Air Jordans: You gotta do what's never been done. For the first time, we stacked a full-length Zoom Strobel unit on top of full-length ZoomX foam for responsive, marathon-level cushioning. Up top, internal straps work with premium materials to give you optimal containment. Underfoot, a unique herringbone traction pattern helps you leave defenders guessing. Cushioning. Bounce. Traction. It's almost too easy.

properties.body:
There's only one way to celebrate 40 years of Air Jordans: You gotta do what's never been done. For the first time, we stacked a full-length Zoom Strobel unit on top of full-length ZoomX foam for responsive, marathon-level cushioning. Up top, internal straps work with premium materials to give you optimal containment. Underfoot, a unique herringbone traction pattern helps you leave defenders guessing. Cushioning. Bounce. Traction. It's almost too easy.
SKU: IR2085-001

productContent.fullTitle: Air Jordan 40 "WNBA" Men's Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Air Jordan 40 "WNBA"
productContent.subtitle: Men's Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
There's only one way to celebrate 40 years of Air Jordans. You gotta do what's never been done. For the first time, we stacked a full-length Zoom Strobel unit on top of full-length ZoomX foam for responsive, marathon-level cushioning. Up top, internal straps work with premium materials to give you optimal containment. Underfoot, a unique herringbone traction pattern helps you leave defenders guessing. Cushioning. Bounce. Traction. It's almost too easy.


Benefits

  • ZoomX foam with a full-length Air Zoom Strobel unit gives you responsiveness.
  • Six internal webbing straps combine with premium materials in the upper to help hold your foot in place for optimal containment

Product Details

  • Low-cut collar

content.text: Get your piece of Jordan history with the Air Jordan 5 Retro. Based on the classic game shoe from 1990, it has all the iconic details like the bump-out collar, lace toggle and fighter plane-inspired design lines. The crisp white upper is balanced with Metallic Silver details and a translucent outsole, then punctuated with Nike Air branding at the heel to complete the classic look.

productContent.fullTitle: Air Jordan 5 Retro OG "White Metallic" Men's Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: Air Jordan 5 Retro OG "White Metallic"
productContent.subtitle: Men's Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
Get your piece of Jordan history with the Air Jordan 5 Retro. Based on the classic game shoe from 1990, it has all the iconic details like the bump-out collar, lace toggle and fighter plane-inspired design lines. The crisp white upper is balanced with Metallic Silver details and a translucent outsole, then punctuated with Nike Air branding at the heel to complete the classic look.


Benefits

  • Real and synthetic leather mix with textiles to add durability and structure to the upper.
  • Nike Air technology absorbs impact for cushioning with every step.
  • Foam midsole adds lightweight cushioning.
  • Rubber in the outsole gives you durable traction.

Product Details

  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

Based on the classic game shoe from 1990, it has iconic details like the bump-out collar and fighter plane-inspired design lines. The crisp white upper is balanced with Metallic Silver details and a translucent outsole, then punctuated with Nike Air branding at the heel to complete the classic look.


Benefits

  • Real and synthetic leather mix with textiles to add durability and structure to the upper.
  • Foam midsole cushions little feet.
  • Rubber in the outsole adds durable traction.

Product Details

  • Not intended for use as Personal Protective Equipment (PPE)

content.text: Remember the revolution. 1987 saw the birth of the Air Max lineage, showcasing visible Air for the first time. Benefits

  • Rubber Waffle outsole delivers durable traction and heritage style.

productContent.fullTitle: Nike Air Liquid Max Men's Shoes
productContent.title: Nike Air Liquid Max
productContent.subtitle: Men's Shoes
productContent.description:
The Air Liquid Max wasn't made to convince you. It was made to innovate. Do you like it, or not? Either way, it's one of the most comfortable Air Max shoes to date. Every step feels fluid and smooth thanks to the drop-in Cushlon Midsole stacked on top of the point-loaded Air system. If you do try it, you just might like it.


Benefits

  • Cushlon foam and Nike Air combination gives you comfort all day.
  • Low-profile upper, made of textured mesh, creates a secure fit that moves with you

content.text: A’ja runs the floor at full speed, all game. That’s why we made the A’Two even more responsive than her original. And this isn't just a sequel—it's the next level. Cushlon 3.0 foam provides optimal cushioning and responsiveness to help you sprint rim-to-rim. A snappy bottom-loaded Air Zoom unit in the forefoot gives your first step even more juice when attacking the hoop. As a nod to A’ja’s signature asymmetry, we added paneled ventilation to one side of the shoe for when the game heats up. If you’re ready to keep pace with the M’VP, go full force with soft cushioning that combines with powerful Air Zoom in an encore with extra oomph.
Please note: This shoe runs approximately half a size small. For your usual fit, consider ordering half a size up.

productContent.fullTitle: A'Two "A'Pink Shoe" A'ja Wilson Basketball Shoes
productContent.title: A'Two "A'Pink Shoe"
productContent.subtitle: A'ja Wilson Basketball Shoes
productContent.description:
A’ja runs the floor at full speed, all game. That’s why we made the A’Two more responsive than her original. If you’re ready to keep pace with the M’VP, go full force with soft cushioning that combines with powerful Air Zoom in an encore with extra oomph.


All Pink Everything

The A’One introduced A’ja to the globe. Now it’s time to show what follows. This A’Two takes her favorite pink color to a whole new level, drenching it in a statement-making shade that’s bright, bold and impossible to ignore. Touches of color shifting iridescent throughout put a stamp on the start of the A’Two journey.


Keep Running

Cushlon 3.0 foam provides optimal cushioning and responsiveness to help you sprint rim-to-rim. A soft layer of extra foam on top offers comfort and support.


Get it and Go

A snappy bottom-loaded Air Zoom unit in the forefoot gives your first step even more juice when attacking the hoop. A midfoot plate provides ample stability for dynamic movements.


Stop on a Dime

Our herringbone traction pattern helps you stop on a dime and shift gears on command. An injected molded heel counter stabilizes and contains your foot.


Lock In

The durable upper molds to your foot, keeping you locked in when you’re checking opponents defensively or blowing by them with the rock.


Let it Breathe

As a nod to A’ja’s signature asymmetry we added paneled ventilation to one side of the shoe for when the game heats up.

productContent.description:
The AJ5 is unmistakable. Fierce zig-zag details on the midsole, peekaboo mesh panels and iconic lace locks make for standout style. Velvety nubuck leather and metallic accents give this pair a premium look and feel.


Benefits

  • Real and synthetic leather works with textiles in the upper to offer durability and structure.
  • Plush and comfortable, Max Air cushioning has just the right amount of support.
  • Foam midsole helps add lightweight cushioning.
  • Rubber in the outsole helps provide durable traction.
  • Lace lock helps you secure your fit fast.

Product Details

  • Classic laces
  • 2 sets of laces
  • Foam midsole
  • Rubber outsole
